title: Internal error in V3DfgPeephole on out-of-range

features.name: out-of-range selection with parameter plus constant
features.description: Code should include a parameter plus constant expression used as selection index on a wire where the index exceeds the wire's bit range

features.name: generate for loop with genvar instantiating module using array element
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop with genvar that instantiates a module passing an array element indexed by the loop variable

features.name: wire with parameter-sized range and constant index
features.description: Code should include a wire declared with a parameter as part of its range, and a separate out-of-range constant index access to that wire
